2026-03-25T09:34:08.6309063Z ##[group]Run actions/github-script@ed597411d8f924073f98dfc5c65a23a2325f34cd
2026-03-25T09:34:08.6310618Z with:
2026-03-25T09:34:08.6318280Z   script: const fs = require('fs');
const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
if (!outputFile) {
  core.info('No agent output found');
  return;
}
const agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
for (const item of items) {
  await github.rest.issues.createComment({
    owner: context.repo.owner,
    repo: context.repo.repo,
    issue_number: context.issue.number,
    body: item.message
  });
  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${context.issue.number}`);
}

2026-03-25T09:34:08.6327481Z   debug: false
2026-03-25T09:34:08.6328248Z   user-agent: actions/github-script
2026-03-25T09:34:08.6329228Z   result-encoding: json
2026-03-25T09:34:08.6330030Z   retries: 0
2026-03-25T09:34:08.6330898Z   retry-exempt-status-codes: 400,401,403,404,422
